scope: Tier-1 declarative migration: the entries stream only (legacy-parity list read); categories is out of scope, see excluded entry below

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: the raw response is a bare array of scalar strings (or an object wrapping one), fanned out one record per string by legacy's own readCategories/stringSlice helper; connsdk.RecordsAt only extracts array elements that decode as JSON objects (a scalar string element is silently dropped, yielding zero records) and records.keyed_object explodes an object's VALUES which must themselves be objects, so neither declarative primitive can express a scalar-array-to-record fan-out — the same gap class as ip2whois's nameservers deviation (docs/migration/conventions.md ledger item 12)
